docs.title: Commands
docs.text:
• mkdocs new [dir-name] - Create a new project.
  • mkdocs serve - Start the live-reloading docs server.
  • mkdocs build - Build the documentation site.
  • mkdocs -h - Print help message and exit.

docs.title: Project layout
docs.text:
mkdocs.yml    # The configuration file.
docs/
    index.md  # The documentation homepage.
    ...       # Other markdown pages, images and other files.

docs.title: About Me
docs.text: Hello! This is my new website created with MkDocs.

docs.title: My Goals:
docs.text:
• Learn how to use Markdown.
  • Build a cool documentation site.
  • Keep things simple!

MkDocs makes it really easy to turn these notes into a website.

docs.title: Image Example Page
docs.text:
Here is a picture I added to my project:

Note: Make sure the filename in the code matches your actual file (e.g., .jpg, .png, or .gif).

docs.title: Details
docs.text: It is a long established fact that a reader will be distracted by the readable content of a page when looking at its layout. The point of using Lorem Ipsum is that it has a more-or-less normal distribution of letters, as opposed to using 'Content here, content here', making it look like readable English. Many desktop publishing packages and web page editors now use Lorem Ipsum as their default model text, and a search for 'lorem ipsum' will uncover many web sites still in their infancy. Various versions have evolved over the years, sometimes by accident, sometimes on purpose (injected humour and the like).
